_meta.description: Day-level Discord context extracted from curated extracts. NOT message-level matching (raw timestamped chat unavailable for full period). Each date entry: Apollo AM/PM paradigm, key levels, regime tags (vix posture, vanna), explicit named patterns flagged by pros.
_meta.tz_note: Discord raw timestamps are KSA (UTC+3). KSA - 7h = ET.

2026-03-23.notes: 200pt futures spike pre-market. All 4 morning losses (09:45-10:38 ET) charm-limit entries. Volatility-spike-pause idea from this date.

2026-03-27.notes: Discord called selloff correctly. V12-fix produced -19.6 across 3 trades.

2026-03-30.notes: Mixed/bearish Discord bias. V12-fix +66.5 across 3 trades.

2026-03-31.notes: Apollo called 6510 fade. DM called 6525 ES target. jk23 called 6530 close (correct).

2026-04-01.notes: Apollo AM: GEX pure, target 6600, LIS 6525. PM: support 6570 -> 6530. Apollo called 6650 top of the week (WRONG).

2026-04-02.notes: Apollo AM: top, large -DD, no support to 6500, overvixed. PM: DD turned positive, support 6545. Citrini supply-chain memo (copper +30%, freight 2x).

2026-04-06.notes: Apollo: GEX, LIS 6550, target 6640. PM: target 6620. Yahya RIGHT - dealer-setup conviction longs.

2026-04-07.notes: Apollo AM: GEX, target 6605 NAILED. PM ceasefire pop. DM walked 6725 -> 6740 -> 6800 -> 6825 vanna towers, all hit.

2026-04-08.notes: Apollo: GEX, extreme undervixing, 6770 pivot, ceiling 6810. PM 6790 ceiling, 6720 deeper support. Apollo: 'fade rally - undervix exhaustion.' Chopped.

2026-05-04.notes: AM AG messy. PM shifted to BofA. Vanna supportive PM.

2026-05-05.notes: BofA both AM/PM. Support 7240/7250, weak resistance 7270. PM still 7240/7250 / 7290-7300 higher order.

2026-05-06.notes: AM AG could shift BofA. PM shifted BofA. 7355 upper resistance multi-test. Overvixing more PM. Negative vanna across tenors. Wizard: 'VIX flashing warning signs.'

2026-05-07.notes: AM DD positive, support 7360, resist 7380/7385. PM BofA, 7350 upper / 7320-7310 vanna support.

2026-05-08.notes: GEX both AM/PM. Support 7380/7370 AM, 7400 big pivot PM. JPM Q2 collar 500pts ITM on short calls. DM breadth divergence warning.

2026-05-11.notes: GEX AM. PM GEX target hit. 7425 pivot, 7450 next. Apollo: 'over 7416 you are back in normal GEX'. LordHelmet: 'backside short scalp territory'. 3k limit seller at 7430 ES. Apollo flow divergence.

2026-05-12.notes: Last day of May 5-12 sync window. No specific entry in daily table.
